title: auganthus jesoanus
intro: Auganthus jesoanus is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the Japanese angelica tree or angelica tree. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Auganthus jesoanus is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
